meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for ZTE repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: ZTE Repair Winnipeg | nubia & Blade Screen Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: ZTE phone repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, charging repair for ZTE nubia, Red Magic, Blade & Axon series. Rare device specialists.
page.h1: ZTE & nubia Repair Specialists in Winnipeg
page.heroDescription: From nubia Red Magic gaming phones to budget Blade devices, we repair all ZTE phones in Winnipeg. Hard to find parts? We've got the sourcing connections.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked ZTE and nubia screens—including Red Magic gaming displays.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery life to your ZTE or nubia device.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Repair under-display and traditional cameras on ZTE devices.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix dual stereo speakers and audio issues.

services.name: Power Issues
services.description: Diagnose and fix power, boot, and cooling system problems.

advantage_pillars.title: ZTE & nubia Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's experts in ZTE and nubia gaming devices.

advantage_pillars.title: Gaming Phone Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Specialized in Red Magic cooling systems and gaming features.

advantage_pillars.title: Rare Device Parts
advantage_pillars.description: Sourcing network for hard-to-find ZTE and nubia components.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: nubia Gaming Series
model_categories.description: Red Magic gaming phones with cooling system expertise.

model_categories.title: Axon Flagships
model_categories.description: Premium Axon series with under-display camera.

models_description: We repair all ZTE devices including nubia gaming phones, Blade series, Axon flagships, and foldables.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: ZTE repair costs vary by model. ZTE's global device support page provides firmware updates.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: nubia and Red Magic repairs can approach premium device pricing. iFixit's gaming phone teardowns illustrate the complexity.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your device's value, we'll explain alternatives.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair ZTE phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few shops in Winnipeg that services ZTE devices.

faqs.question: Can you repair ZTE nubia Red Magic gaming phones?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We service all Red Magic models.

faqs.question: Are ZTE and nubia parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We can source parts for most ZTE models.

faqs.question: Do you repair ZTE foldable phones?
faqs.answer: Yes! We service the nubia Fold and nubia Flip.

faqs.question: How long does ZTE repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed same-day if parts are in stock.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
